q: Who has been appointed as the new Chief Minister of Bihar following the political transition in early 2026?
e: Samrat Chaudhary was designated as the Chief Minister of Bihar in 2026 following a major shift in the state's political alliance.

q: Which Indian city has been ranked as the 'Cleanest City' in the Swachh Survekshan 2025-26 results?
e: Indore continued its streak by securing the top rank as India's cleanest city for the 9th consecutive year in the latest survey.

q: The 2026 Asian Games (XIX Asian Games) are scheduled to be held in which country?
e: The 2026 Asian Games will be hosted by Aichi Prefecture and the city of Nagoya in Japan.

q: India's 'National Vaccination Day' is celebrated on which date?
e: National Vaccination Day was celebrated on 16 March 2026 in India[cite: 375].

q: The government launched an HPV vaccination campaign targeting how many adolescent girls?
e: The HPV campaign targets 1.15 crore girls aged 14 years to prevent cervical cancer[cite: 376, 485].

q: Which digital platform is used for tracking life-cycle routine immunization in India?
e: U-WIN is used for tracking routine immunization, while CoWIN was for COVID-19[cite: 443, 477, 574].

q: India accounts for approximately what percentage of global cervical cancer deaths?
e: India contributes approximately 25% of global cervical cancer deaths (nearly 80,000 annually).

q: Which virus is the primary cause of cervical cancer?
e: Cervical cancer is primarily caused by persistent infection with high-risk strains of HPV.

q: Which vaccine is India currently administering for its free HPV vaccination campaign?
e: India is introducing single-dose HPV vaccination using Gardasil-4.

q: Which digital system manages the 'Cold-Chain' and stock visibility of vaccines in India?
e: eVIN (Electronic Vaccine Intelligence Network) ensures cold-chain integrity and stock visibility.

q: The Universal Immunization Programme (UIP) in India was launched in which year?
e: The UIP was launched in 1985 to provide free vaccination against preventable diseases.

q: What is India's 'Net-Zero' emissions target year announced at COP26?
e: India has committed to achieving net-zero emissions by the year 2070.

q: What is the enhanced target for 'Emissions Intensity Reduction' of GDP by 2035 in India's new NDC?
e: India's updated NDC (2031-2035) enhances the target to 47% emissions intensity reduction.

q: Which Indian state has witnessed the highest adoption of Electric Vehicles (EVs) between 2019 and 2025?
o: Data not specific | डेटा विशिष्ट नहीं
e: While the text highlights year-on-year growth (1.74 Lakh to 19.68 Lakh), it does not rank states specifically for adoption but mentions 19 states participating in e-bus schemes[cite: 997, 1069].

q: The 'PM E-DRIVE Scheme' launched in September 2024 incentivizes which category?
o: Electric vehicles (2W, 3W, trucks, buses) | इलेक्ट्रिक वाहन
e: PM E-DRIVE incentivizes adoption of electric two-wheelers, three-wheelers, trucks, and buses.

q:
In which cities will ship repair facilities be established?
किन शहरों में जहाज मरम्मत सुविधाएं स्थापित की जाएंगी?
o: Varanasi and Patna | वाराणसी और पटना
e: Ship repair facilities will be established in Varanasi and Patna. / जहाज मरम्मत सुविधाएं वाराणसी और पटना में स्थापित की जाएंगी।

q:
Where will the 'Rare Earth Permanent Magnet' corridor be established?
'दुर्लभ पृथ्वी स्थायी चुंबक' कॉरिडोर कहाँ स्थापित किया जाएगा?
o: Odisha, Kerala, Andhra, Tamil Nadu | ओडिशा, केरल, आंध्र, तमिलनाडु
e: The corridor for rare minerals will span Odisha, Kerala, Andhra Pradesh, and Tamil Nadu. / यह कॉरिडोर ओडिशा, केरल, आंध्र और तमिलनाडु में बनेगा।

q: Which mineral is critical for 'Electric Motors' and 'EV Drivetrains'?
o: Rare Earth Magnets | दुर्लभ पृथ्वी चुंबक
e: Rare earth magnets are critical components for EV motors and drivetrains.

q: How many 'Polluted River Stretches' (PRSs) were identified by CPCB in its 2025 report?
e: The CPCB 2025 report identified 296 Polluted River Stretches on 271 rivers.

q: Which Indian state has the 'highest' number of Polluted River Stretches (54) as of 2025?
e: Maharashtra has the highest number of PRSs (54), followed by Kerala (32).

q: The publication 'Energy Statistics India 2026' was released by which office?
o: National Statistics Office (NSO) | राष्ट्रीय सांख्यिकी कार्यालय
e: The 33rd edition of Energy Statistics India was released by the National Statistics Office under MoSPI.

q: What is the standardized unit used in the Energy Statistics report?
o: KTOE (Kilo Tonnes of Oil Equivalent) | केटीओई
e: KTOE is the standardized unit used to measure primary energy supply and consumption.

q: Which fuel remains the 'backbone' of India's energy mix, supplying the largest portion of energy?
e: Coal remains the backbone of India's energy mix and the largest source of supply.

q: Which Indian state has the highest Renewable Energy (RE) potential (23.7%)?
e: Rajasthan has the highest renewable energy potential in India at 23.7%.

q: How many Aadhaar holders are there in India as per the March 2026 update?
e: India has approximately 134 crore Aadhaar holders, ensuring near-universal coverage.

q: The 'Puttaswamy Judgment' (2018) by the Supreme Court primarily linked Aadhaar to which right?
o: Right to Privacy (Article 21) | निजता का अधिकार
e: The judgment upheld Aadhaar but linked it to the Right to Privacy under Article 21.

q: Which organization is the statutory authority regulating the Aadhaar ecosystem?
e: UIDAI is the statutory authority under MeitY that regulates Aadhaar enrolment and security.

q: What does the 'Orange Economy' refer to in the National AI Skilling Initiative context?
e: Orange Economy refers to economic activities linked to creativity, culture, and digital content.

q: Which organization operates 'DD Free Dish', India's only free DTH service?
e: DD Free Dish is operated by Prasar Bharati, reaching about 4 crore households.

q: The 'National AI Skilling Initiative' aims to train how many creators in partnership with Google and YouTube?
e: The initiative targets 15,000 creators, students, and professionals for AI training.

q: What is 'Agray', recently inducted into the Indian Navy?
o: ASW Shallow Water Craft | एएसडब्ल्यू शैलो वाटर क्राफ्ट
e: 'Agray' is the fourth Anti-Submarine Warfare Shallow Water Craft built by GRSE.

q: Where was the 'IMEX TTX 2026' maritime exercise hosted by the Indian Navy?
e: The Indian Navy hosted the IONS Maritime Table-top Exercise (IMEX TTX) 2026 at Kochi.

q: Which organization acts as the 'National Nodal Agency' for responding to cyber security incidents?
e: CERT-In is the nodal agency for incident response under Section 70B of the IT Act, 2000.

q: What is the dedicated helpline number for reporting 'Financial Cyber Frauds' in India?
e: Helpline 1930 is dedicated to the immediate reporting of financial cyber frauds.

q: The 'I4C' (Indian Cyber Crime Coordination Centre) is an initiative of which ministry?
o: Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA) | गृह मंत्रालय
e: I4C is an initiative of the Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA) for integrated cybercrime response.

q: Which joint military exercise was conducted between India and 'Egypt' (Misr)?
e: The 4th joint special exercise 'Cyclone' was held between Indian and Egyptian armies.

q:
Where is the indigenous 'Fast Breeder Reactor' located?
स्वदेशी 'फास्ट ब्रीडर रिएक्टर' कहाँ स्थित है?
e: The prototype FBR is established in Kalpakkam, Tamil Nadu. / यह तमिलनाडु के कलपक्कम में स्थित है।

q: The 'Vedic Clock' (Vikramaditya) based on the Panchang is established in which city?
e: According to the transcript, the Vedic clock is established in Varanasi.

q:
Which country introduced the first 10G internet?
किस देश ने पहला 10G इंटरनेट पेश किया?
e: UAE presented the world's first 10G network. / यूएई ने दुनिया का पहला 10G नेटवर्क पेश किया।

q: Which state has recently declared 'Cancer' as a notified disease?
e: Telangana has declared cancer as a notified/reportable disease[cite: 1413].

q: The 'Kigali Protocol' deals with the phasing out of which substances?
e: Under the Kigali Protocol, India has committed to phasing out HFCs after 2027.

q: Which FMCG company in India first achieved a 1 trillion rupee turnover in FY26?
e: Amul became the first Indian FMCG company to cross the 1 trillion rupee turnover milestone.

q:
Where was India's first quantum computer launched?
भारत का पहला क्वांटम कंप्यूटर कहाँ लॉन्च किया गया?
e: India's first quantum computer was launched in Amravati. / भारत का पहला क्वांटम कंप्यूटर अमरावती में लॉन्च हुआ।

q: The 'Jan Vishwas (Amendment of Provisions) Bill, 2026' primarily focuses on which of the following?
o: Decriminalization of minor offences | लघु अपराधों को गैर-आपराधिक बनाना
e: The bill proposes large-scale decriminalization of minor offences to improve Ease of Doing Business and governance efficiency.

q: Under the Jan Vishwas Bill 2026, how many provisions across how many Central Acts are proposed to be amended?
o: 784 provisions across 79 Acts | 79 कानूनों में 784 प्रावधान
e: The Bill proposes the amendment of 784 provisions across 79 Central Acts under 23 Ministries.

q: Which constitutional article is aligned with the Jan Vishwas Bill by avoiding excessive criminalization?
e: The bill aligns with Article 21 (due process, proportionality) by avoiding excessive criminalization for minor offences.

q: The Subhash Chandra Bose Aapda Prabandhan Puraskar was instituted in which year?
e: The award was instituted in 2019 by the Ministry of Home Affairs to recognize excellence in disaster management.

q: On which date is the Subhash Chandra Bose Aapda Prabandhan Puraskar announced annually?
e: The award is announced every year on 23rd January, which is observed as Parakram Diwas.

q: What is the cash prize awarded to an 'Institution' under the SCB Aapda Prabandhan Puraskar?
e: The cash award is Rs. 51 lakh for an institution and Rs. 5 lakh for an individual.

q: According to the PIB summary, what is India's current economic growth rate mentioned in the budget?
e: The budget summary states that India is growing at a 7% growth rate.

q: The 'Bharat Electricity Summit 2026' was inaugurated at which venue?
o: Yashobhoomi, New Delhi | यशोभूमि, नई दिल्ली
e: The summit was inaugurated on 19 March 2026 at Yashobhoomi, New Delhi.

q: What is India's target for non-fossil fuel capacity by the year 2035-36?
e: The National Resource Adequacy Plan targets 900 GW non-fossil capacity by 2035-36.

q: India operates the world's largest synchronized electricity grid known as ____.
o: One Nation One Grid | वन नेशन वन ग्रिड
e: India operates the world's largest synchronized grid (One Nation One Grid), completed in December 2013.

q: Which scheme aims to promote 'Rooftop Solar' adoption in Indian households?
o: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana | पीएम सूर्य घर मुफ्त बिजली योजना
e: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana, launched in February 2024, promotes rooftop solar adoption.

q:
Which state's police received the 'President's Color' award?
किस राज्य की पुलिस को 'प्रेसिडेंट कलर' पुरस्कार मिला?
e: Odisha Police has been honored with the President's Color. / ओडिशा पुलिस को प्रेसिडेंट कलर से सम्मानित किया गया।

q: The '24 Speed Post' initiative launched on 17 March 2026 guarantees delivery within ____.
e: '24 Speed Post' provides D+1 (next-day) guaranteed delivery.

q: Which of the following cities is NOT part of the initial phase of '24 Speed Post' service?
e: The first phase covers six metros: Delhi, Mumbai, Chennai, Kolkata, Bengaluru, and Hyderabad.

q: Under which schedule and list of the Constitution do 'Postal Services' fall?
e: Postal services fall under the Union List (Entry 31, Seventh Schedule).

q: What is the primary goal of the 'National Logistics Policy' regarding logistics costs in India?
o: Reduction of logistics cost (~13-14% of GDP) | लॉजिस्टिक्स लागत को कम करना
e: The '24 Speed Post' contributes to the National Logistics Policy goal of reducing logistics costs, which are currently around 13-14% of GDP[cite: 318].

q: In Indian Agriculture, which commodity does India rank Rank #1 globally in production (2024-25)?
e: India ranks 1st in the production of Millets (18.59 MT), Pulses, and Spices[cite: 690, 698, 795, 815].

q: What was India's record foodgrain production in the year 2024-25?
e: India recorded a record production of 357.73 MMT foodgrains in 2024-25.

q: Which sector's output in India has recently 'surpassed' foodgrain production?
e: Horticulture output (362 MT) has risen to surpass foodgrain production.

q: How much income support is provided annually to farmers under the 'PM-KISAN' scheme?
e: PM-KISAN provides Rs. 6,000 annual income support to farmers.

q: The 'e-NAM' platform serves as a digital ecosystem for which purpose?
o: Transparent price discovery and trade | पारदर्शी मूल्य खोज और व्यापार
e: e-NAM platform integrates farmers and mandis for transparent price discovery and inter-state trade.

q: As per PLFS 2025, what is the Labour Force Participation Rate (LFPR) in India?
e: LFPR is at 59.3%, with 79.1% for males and 40.0% for females.

q: What is the 'Unemployment Rate' (UR) in India according to the PLFS 2025 report?
e: The Unemployment Rate (UR) stands at 3.1% as per the PLFS 2025 report.

q: What does 'NEET' stand for in the context of youth workforce underutilization?
o: Not in Education, Employment, or Training | शिक्षा, रोजगार या प्रशिक्षण में नहीं
e: NEET (15-29 years) at ~25% signals underutilization of the youth workforce.

q: According to PLFS 2025, which approach provides employment data for the last 365 days?
e: Usual Status (365 days) and Current Weekly Status (7 days) are the two approaches used by PLFS.

q: The 'Periodic Labour Force Survey' (PLFS) is conducted by which organization?
o: NSO under MoSPI | सांख्यिकी और कार्यक्रम कार्यान्वयन मंत्रालय के तहत एनएसओ
e: PLFS is conducted by the National Statistical Office (NSO) under MoSPI.

q: In the Union Budget 2026-27, from which source does the government receive the highest 'Rupee Comes From' (24 paise)?
o: Borrowings and Other Liabilities | उधार और अन्य देयताएं
e: The highest source of income is Borrowings (24 paise), followed by Income Tax (21 paise).

q: Where is the 'Rupee Goes To' the highest (22 paise) according to the 2026-27 budget?
o: States' share of Taxes & Duties | करों और शुल्कों में राज्यों का हिस्सा
e: The largest expenditure is the States' share of taxes and duties (22%), followed by interest payments (20%).

q: Which ministry receives the highest budget allocation in 2026-27?
e: The Ministry of Defence receives the highest allocation among ministries.

q: The new 'Income Tax Act' is proposed to be effective from which date?
e: A new Income Tax Act will come into effect from 1 April 2026, replacing the 1961 Act.

q: In the budget, how many archaeological sites are planned to be developed as vibrant cultural destinations?
e: 15 archaeological sites, including Lothal and Sarnath, will be developed.

q: Which state has been allocated the highest budget under the 'Pahado ka Gaurav' (Pride of Mountains) scheme?
e: Arunachal Pradesh received the highest budget allocation under this scheme.

q: Which commission recommended the formation of the Reserve Bank of India (RBI)?
o: Hilton Young Commission | हिल्टन यंग कमीशन
e: The Young Hilton Commission recommended the formation of the RBI.

q: What is the revised 'Fiscal Deficit' target for India in the year 2026-27?
e: The estimated Fiscal Deficit for 2026-27 is 4.3%.

q:
What is the cash prize for an 'Institution' under the SCB Aapda Puraskar?
संस्थान को आपदा प्रबंधन पुरस्कार के तहत कितनी राशि मिलती है?
e: The award is 51 lakh for institutions and 5 lakh for individuals. / संस्थानों के लिए 51 लाख और व्यक्तियों के लिए 5 लाख रुपये पुरस्कार है।

q: The 'Jan Vishwas Act 2023' decriminalized how many provisions before the 2026 amendment?
e: The original Jan Vishwas Act, 2023, decriminalized 183 provisions across 42 Acts.

q: Which state has the highest 'Land Inequality' according to the World Inequality Lab report mentioned in the PIB?
e: According to the report, Bihar has the highest land inequality in India.

q: Which country recently became the newest member of the BRICS alliance in 2025-26?
e: Saudi Arabia officially joined the BRICS bloc, expanding the group's influence in the Middle East and global energy markets.

q: What is the name of India's first solar mission that reached its destination (L1 point) to study the Sun?
e: Aditya-L1 is ISRO's dedicated mission to study the Sun's atmosphere, specifically the corona and chromosphere.
